# HIGH PRIORITY: VPN / Security Setup for Field Sites

**Issue Type:** Blocker (required before Feb 15 Go/No-Go)

**Problem:**
VPN and secure remote access infrastructure for field technicians is not yet set up. Field teams need secure connectivity to report data and receive instructions.

**Current State:**
- Status: not initiated
- Deadline: 18 Feb (critical path for field deployment)
- Scope: VPN for 4 sites + remote access policies

**Owner:** Infrastructure / IT Security

**Estimated Effort:** 4 days (infrastructure provisioning + testing)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] VPN infrastructure provisioned (Cisco/WireGuard or equivalent)
- [ ] Field technician access credentials prepared
- [ ] Security audit completed
- [ ] Remote connectivity tested from sample site
- [ ] Documentation for field teams prepared
- [ ] Checklist item 1.40 marked ✅

**References:**
- File: `translations/pt/docs/CHECKLIST_CONCLUSAO_PROJETO.md` (line 104)
- Checklist item: 1.40 | VPN/Security Setup (Angola Acesso)
- Related: Field connectivity requirements in BASELINE_SURVEY_PROTOCOL
